title: Greece — Harmonised Application Form for Schengen Visa
description: The EU-wide 'Harmonised application form / Application for Schengen Visa' (Annex I to the Visa Code, as amended for the EU-UK Withdrawal Agreement), served by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs (MFA) for Greek diplomatic missions/consulates and their VFS Global visa-application-centre partners, opening Greece as a new registry jurisdiction via the Visa vertical. The document is a genuine static text-layer PDF with no AcroForm widgets: applicants complete it as a printed form (32 numbered items on the applicant-facing left column of each page, plus a right-hand 'FOR OFFICIAL USE ONLY' column completed by consulate staff, out of scope). This v1.0.0 scopes to the standard third-country-national applicant pathway (the common case for a non-EU/EEA/CH/UK-national Schengen visa applicant), modelling items 1-16 and 19-33 plus the closing place/date declaration. Item 17-18 (personal data and family relationship of an EU/EEA/CH-citizen or UK-national-Withdrawal-Agreement-beneficiary the applicant depends on) apply only to the smaller family-member sub-category exempted from items 21/22/30/31/32 by the form's own footnote, and are deferred as an out-of-scope future variant — see VERIFICATION.md. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Greece, the Ministry of Foreign Affairs, or VFS Global.

authority.name: Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Hellenic Republic

source.documentRef: Annex I / Harmonised application form — Application for Schengen Visa (bilingual EN/AR edition naming the Greek MFA, 1 Vas. Sofias Ave., Athens, as the data controller)

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2611, a child of the standing research routine (GOV-2609) resolving a pre-scouted candidate from GOV-2591's prior cycle. Opens Greece as this registry's 45th jurisdiction, via its Visa vertical (1 of 6). The primary mfa.gr/aade.gr hosts remain Akamai-403-blocked from this sandbox (independently re-confirmed this cycle: HTTP 403, 'errors.edgesuite.net' Akamai error page). Independently re-located and re-fetched via VFS Global consulate mirrors (not assuming last cycle's specifics reproduce exactly): the canonical source (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/greece/egypt/english/pdf/application-for-schengen-visa.pdf) returned HTTP 200, application/pdf, 726,000 bytes, sha256 303a4c28a53a8b2d88ca219a2b1aff3033a14a25f58708b6c7957414cfeaa969 -- a bilingual English/Arabic, 5-page PDF whose page-4 data-protection notice explicitly names 'Ministry of Foreign Affairs, 1 Vas. Sofias Ave., 10671, Athens ... www.mfa.gr, g04@mfa.gr, st2@mfa.gr' and the Hellenic Data Protection Authority as the data controller/supervisory authority -- confirming this is Greece's own implementation of the EU-wide form, not a generic template. Two independent corroborating mirrors of a near-identical English-only edition were also fetched and byte-hashed: https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/greece/jordan/english/pdf/application-form-template-en-oct-2021.pdf (398,969 bytes, sha256 85068e4f8837fd4f21240cf76d5fd16b6592126aadea361f4f0df61d1717b904, 8 pages) and https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/greece/lebanon/english/pdf/application-form-template-en-oct-2021.pdf (140,666 bytes at the same filename path -- re-fetch returned content-identical text across all 32 numbered items, 9 pages including one blank trailing page, confirming the same underlying template independently served from two unrelated consulate mirrors). Extraction used pdfjs-dist (legacy build, getTextContent()) since the source carries zero AcroForm widgets on every page across all three mirrors (confirmed via getAnnotations()) -- fields were read directly from the printed text layer, not from form widgets. A handful of other VFS Global URLs found in the same search (visa.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/... UAE/Qatar paths) returned Akamai 403s consistent with the prior cycle's finding, and one candidate (Greece-Application-2024-Final.pdf) is a flattened/scanned PDF with zero extractable text on every page -- ruled out and not used.

fields.name: surname
fields.label: Surname (Family name)
fields.description: The applicant's current family name, per the travel document.

fields.name: surnameAtBirth
fields.label: Surname at birth (Former family name(s))
fields.description: A prior family name held at birth, if different from the current surname.

fields.name: firstNames
fields.label: First name(s) (Given name(s))
fields.description: The applicant's given name(s), per the travel document.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth (day-month-year)
fields.description: The applicant's date of birth.

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Place of birth
fields.description: The city/town of the applicant's birth.

fields.name: countryOfBirth
fields.label: Country of birth
fields.description: The country of the applicant's birth.

fields.name: currentNationality
fields.label: Current nationality
fields.description: The applicant's current nationality.

fields.name: nationalityAtBirth
fields.label: Nationality at birth, if different
fields.description: The applicant's nationality at birth, only if different from the current nationality above.

fields.name: otherNationalities
fields.label: Other nationalities
fields.description: Any other nationalities held by the applicant.

fields.name: sexMale
fields.label: Sex: Male
fields.description: One of two mutually-exclusive sex options (see exclusivityGroups).

fields.name: sexFemale
fields.label: Sex: Female
fields.description: See sexMale for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: civilStatusSingle
fields.label: Civil status: Single
fields.description: One of seven mutually-exclusive civil-status options (see exclusivityGroups).

fields.name: civilStatusMarried
fields.label: Civil status: Married
fields.description: See civilStatusSingle for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: civilStatusRegisteredPartnership
fields.label: Civil status: Registered Partnership
fields.description: See civilStatusSingle for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: civilStatusSeparated
fields.label: Civil status: Separated
fields.description: See civilStatusSingle for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: civilStatusDivorced
fields.label: Civil status: Divorced
fields.description: See civilStatusSingle for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: civilStatusWidowed
fields.label: Civil status: Widow(er)
fields.description: See civilStatusSingle for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: civilStatusOther
fields.label: Civil status: Other
fields.description: See civilStatusSingle for the mutual-exclusivity note. When selected, civilStatusOtherDescription should be completed.

fields.name: civilStatusOtherDescription
fields.label: Civil status: Other (please specify)
fields.description: Free-text civil status, required only when civilStatusOther is checked.

fields.name: parentalAuthorityOrGuardianDetails
fields.label: Parental authority (in case of minors)/legal guardian
fields.description: Surname, first name, address (if different from the applicant's), telephone no., e-mail address, and nationality of the parent/legal guardian, required only when the applicant is a minor. No discrete boolean/selector widget exists on the source to key a requiredWhen condition on; left fully optional, per this registry's established convention for the same class of printed 'in case of X' block with no dedicated gating field.

fields.name: nationalIdentityNumber
fields.label: National identity number, where applicable
fields.description: The applicant's national identity number, where one exists.

fields.name: travelDocumentTypeOrdinaryPassport
fields.label: Type of travel document: Ordinary passport
fields.description: One of six mutually-exclusive travel-document-type options (see exclusivityGroups).

fields.name: travelDocumentTypeDiplomaticPassport
fields.label: Type of travel document: Diplomatic passport
fields.description: See travelDocumentTypeOrdinaryPassport for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: travelDocumentTypeServicePassport
fields.label: Type of travel document: Service passport
fields.description: See travelDocumentTypeOrdinaryPassport for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: travelDocumentTypeOfficialPassport
fields.label: Type of travel document: Official passport
fields.description: See travelDocumentTypeOrdinaryPassport for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: travelDocumentTypeSpecialPassport
fields.label: Type of travel document: Special passport
fields.description: See travelDocumentTypeOrdinaryPassport for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: travelDocumentTypeOther
fields.label: Type of travel document: Other
fields.description: See travelDocumentTypeOrdinaryPassport for the mutual-exclusivity note. When selected, travelDocumentTypeOtherDescription should be completed.

fields.name: travelDocumentTypeOtherDescription
fields.label: Type of travel document: Other (please specify)
fields.description: Free-text travel document type, required only when travelDocumentTypeOther is checked.

fields.name: travelDocumentNumber
fields.label: Number of travel document
fields.description: The travel document's number.

fields.name: travelDocumentDateOfIssue
fields.label: Date of issue
fields.description: The travel document's date of issue.

fields.name: travelDocumentValidUntil
fields.label: Valid until
fields.description: The travel document's expiry date.

fields.name: travelDocumentIssuedByCountry
fields.label: Issued by (country)
fields.description: The country that issued the travel document.

fields.name: applicantHomeAddress
fields.label: Applicant's home address
fields.description: The applicant's home address.

fields.name: applicantEmail
fields.label: Applicant's e-mail address
fields.description: The applicant's e-mail address.

fields.name: applicantTelephone
fields.label: Telephone no.
fields.description: A contact telephone number for the applicant.

fields.name: residesInOtherCountryNo
fields.label: Residence in a country other than the country of current nationality: No
fields.description: One of two mutually-exclusive options (see exclusivityGroups).

fields.name: residesInOtherCountryYes
fields.label: Residence in a country other than the country of current nationality: Yes
fields.description: See residesInOtherCountryNo for the mutual-exclusivity note. When selected, residencePermitNumber and residencePermitValidUntil should be completed.

fields.name: residencePermitNumber
fields.label: Residence permit or equivalent — No.
fields.description: The residence permit (or equivalent) number, required only when residesInOtherCountryYes is checked.

fields.name: residencePermitValidUntil
fields.label: Residence permit or equivalent — Valid until
fields.description: The residence permit's validity date, required only when residesInOtherCountryYes is checked.

fields.name: currentOccupation
fields.label: Current occupation
fields.description: The applicant's current occupation. The source's own footnote exempts family members of an EU/EEA/CH citizen or UK national Withdrawal Agreement beneficiary from this field; that sub-category is out of scope for this v1.0.0 (see the schema-level description), so this field is modelled as required for the standard applicant pathway.

fields.name: employerOrSchoolDetails
fields.label: Employer and employer's address and telephone number. For students, name and address of educational establishment
fields.description: The applicant's employer (name, address, telephone) or, for students, the name and address of their educational establishment. See currentOccupation for the same disclosed EU-family-member exemption/out-of-scope note.

fields.name: purposeTourism
fields.label: Purpose of the journey: Tourism
fields.description: One of ten mutually-exclusive purpose-of-journey options (see exclusivityGroups).

fields.name: purposeBusiness
fields.label: Purpose of the journey: Business
fields.description: See purposeTourism for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: purposeVisitingFamilyOrFriends
fields.label: Purpose of the journey: Visiting family or friends
fields.description: See purposeTourism for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: purposeCultural
fields.label: Purpose of the journey: Cultural
fields.description: See purposeTourism for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: purposeSports
fields.label: Purpose of the journey: Sports
fields.description: See purposeTourism for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: purposeOfficialVisit
fields.label: Purpose of the journey: Official visit
fields.description: See purposeTourism for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: purposeMedicalReasons
fields.label: Purpose of the journey: Medical reasons
fields.description: See purposeTourism for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: purposeStudy
fields.label: Purpose of the journey: Study
fields.description: See purposeTourism for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: purposeAirportTransit
fields.label: Purpose of the journey: Airport transit
fields.description: See purposeTourism for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: purposeOther
fields.label: Purpose of the journey: Other
fields.description: See purposeTourism for the mutual-exclusivity note. When selected, purposeOtherDescription should be completed.

fields.name: purposeOtherDescription
fields.label: Purpose of the journey: Other (please specify)
fields.description: Free-text purpose of the journey, required only when purposeOther is checked.

fields.name: additionalInfoOnPurposeOfStay
fields.label: Additional information on purpose of stay
fields.description: Any further detail on the purpose of the applicant's stay.

fields.name: memberStateOfMainDestination
fields.label: Member State of main destination
fields.description: The Schengen Member State that is the applicant's main destination.

fields.name: otherMemberStatesOfDestination
fields.label: Other Member States of destination, if applicable
fields.description: Any other Schengen Member States the applicant intends to visit.

fields.name: memberStateOfFirstEntry
fields.label: Member State of first entry
fields.description: The Schengen Member State the applicant intends to enter first.

fields.name: numberOfEntriesRequestedSingle
fields.label: Number of entries requested: Single entry
fields.description: One of three mutually-exclusive options (see exclusivityGroups).

fields.name: numberOfEntriesRequestedTwo
fields.label: Number of entries requested: Two entries
fields.description: See numberOfEntriesRequestedSingle for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: numberOfEntriesRequestedMultiple
fields.label: Number of entries requested: Multiple entries
fields.description: See numberOfEntriesRequestedSingle for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: intendedArrivalDate
fields.label: Intended date of arrival of the first intended stay in the Schengen area
fields.description: The applicant's intended date of first arrival in the Schengen area.

fields.name: intendedDepartureDate
fields.label: Intended date of departure from the Schengen area after the first intended stay
fields.description: The applicant's intended date of departure from the Schengen area after the first intended stay.

fields.name: fingerprintsPreviouslyCollectedNo
fields.label: Fingerprints collected previously for the purpose of applying for a Schengen visa: No
fields.description: One of two mutually-exclusive options (see exclusivityGroups).

fields.name: fingerprintsPreviouslyCollectedYes
fields.label: Fingerprints collected previously for the purpose of applying for a Schengen visa: Yes
fields.description: See fingerprintsPreviouslyCollectedNo for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: fingerprintsCollectionDate
fields.label: Date, if known
fields.description: The date fingerprints were previously collected, if known. Relevant only when fingerprintsPreviouslyCollectedYes is checked; the source itself qualifies this field 'if known' rather than tying it to a strict requiredWhen, so it is left optional here rather than gated.

fields.name: previousVisaNumber
fields.label: Number of the visa, if known
fields.description: The number of a previously issued Schengen visa, if known. See fingerprintsCollectionDate for the same 'if known' disclosure. The corroborating English-only mirrors (Jordan/Lebanon) label this same blank 'Visa sticker number, if known' -- a wording variance across mirrors disclosed in VERIFICATION.md, not a different field.

fields.name: entryPermitIssuedBy
fields.label: Entry permit for the final country of destination — Issued by
fields.description: The authority that issued an entry permit for the final country of destination, where applicable (e.g. for transit).

fields.name: entryPermitValidFrom
fields.label: Entry permit for the final country of destination — Valid from
fields.description: The entry permit's start of validity, where applicable.

fields.name: entryPermitValidUntil
fields.label: Entry permit for the final country of destination — Valid until
fields.description: The entry permit's end of validity, where applicable.

fields.name: invitingPersonOrHotelName
fields.label: Surname and first name of the inviting person(s) in the Member State(s) — or name of hotel(s)/temporary accommodation(s)
fields.description: The inviting individual host(s)' name, or (if not applicable) the name of the hotel(s)/temporary accommodation(s) in the Member State(s). The source provides no discrete selector distinguishing this private-host pathway (item 30) from the inviting-company pathway (item 31); an applicant is expected to complete whichever applies, disclosed here rather than both being made required, per this registry's convention for disclosed either/or requirements.

fields.name: invitingPersonAddressEmail
fields.label: Address and e-mail address of inviting person(s)/hotel(s)/temporary accommodation(s)
fields.description: See invitingPersonOrHotelName for the either/or disclosure.

fields.name: invitingPersonTelephone
fields.label: Telephone no. (inviting person(s)/hotel(s))
fields.description: See invitingPersonOrHotelName for the either/or disclosure.

fields.name: invitingCompanyNameAddress
fields.label: Name and address of inviting company/organisation
fields.description: The inviting company/organisation's name and address. See invitingPersonOrHotelName for the either/or disclosure with the private-host pathway.

fields.name: invitingCompanyContactPersonDetails
fields.label: Surname, first name, address, telephone no., and e-mail address of contact person in company/organisation
fields.description: The contact person's details at the inviting company/organisation.

fields.name: invitingCompanyTelephone
fields.label: Telephone no. of company/organisation
fields.description: A general contact telephone number for the inviting company/organisation.

fields.name: costCoveredByApplicant
fields.label: Cost of travelling and living during the applicant's stay is covered by: the applicant
fields.description: One of two mutually-exclusive options (see exclusivityGroups). When selected, one of costApplicantMeans* should be completed.

fields.name: costCoveredBySponsor
fields.label: Cost of travelling and living during the applicant's stay is covered by: a sponsor (host, company, organisation)
fields.description: See costCoveredByApplicant for the mutual-exclusivity note. When selected, one of costSponsorIdentification* and one of costSponsorMeans* should be completed.

fields.name: costApplicantMeansCash
fields.label: Means of support (applicant): Cash
fields.description: One of six mutually-exclusive means-of-support options for the applicant-covered pathway (see exclusivityGroups). Relevant only when costCoveredByApplicant is checked.

fields.name: costApplicantMeansTravellersCheques
fields.label: Means of support (applicant): Traveller's cheques
fields.description: See costApplicantMeansCash for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: costApplicantMeansCreditCard
fields.label: Means of support (applicant): Credit card
fields.description: See costApplicantMeansCash for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: costApplicantMeansPrePaidAccommodation
fields.label: Means of support (applicant): Pre-paid accommodation
fields.description: See costApplicantMeansCash for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: costApplicantMeansPrePaidTransport
fields.label: Means of support (applicant): Pre-paid transport
fields.description: See costApplicantMeansCash for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: costApplicantMeansOther
fields.label: Means of support (applicant): Other
fields.description: See costApplicantMeansCash for the mutual-exclusivity note. When selected, costApplicantMeansOtherDescription should be completed.

fields.name: costApplicantMeansOtherDescription
fields.label: Means of support (applicant): Other (please specify)
fields.description: Free-text means of support, required only when costApplicantMeansOther is checked.

fields.name: costSponsorIdentificationReferredToInField30Or31
fields.label: Sponsor identification: referred to in field 30 or 31
fields.description: One of two mutually-exclusive options identifying the sponsor named under costCoveredBySponsor (see exclusivityGroups). Relevant only when costCoveredBySponsor is checked.

fields.name: costSponsorIdentificationOther
fields.label: Sponsor identification: other (please specify)
fields.description: See costSponsorIdentificationReferredToInField30Or31 for the mutual-exclusivity note. When selected, costSponsorIdentificationOtherDescription should be completed.

fields.name: costSponsorIdentificationOtherDescription
fields.label: Sponsor identification: other (please specify) — detail
fields.description: Free-text identification of the sponsor, required only when costSponsorIdentificationOther is checked.

fields.name: costSponsorMeansCash
fields.label: Means of support (sponsor): Cash
fields.description: One of five mutually-exclusive means-of-support options for the sponsor-covered pathway (see exclusivityGroups). Relevant only when costCoveredBySponsor is checked.

fields.name: costSponsorMeansAccommodationProvided
fields.label: Means of support (sponsor): Accommodation provided
fields.description: See costSponsorMeansCash for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: costSponsorMeansAllExpensesCoveredDuringStay
fields.label: Means of support (sponsor): All expenses covered during the stay
fields.description: See costSponsorMeansCash for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: costSponsorMeansPrePaidTransport
fields.label: Means of support (sponsor): Pre-paid transport
fields.description: See costSponsorMeansCash for the mutual-exclusivity note.

fields.name: costSponsorMeansOther
fields.label: Means of support (sponsor): Other
fields.description: See costSponsorMeansCash for the mutual-exclusivity note. When selected, costSponsorMeansOtherDescription should be completed.

fields.name: costSponsorMeansOtherDescription
fields.label: Means of support (sponsor): Other (please specify)
fields.description: Free-text means of support, required only when costSponsorMeansOther is checked.

fields.name: personFillingFormName
fields.label: Surname and first name of the person filling in the application form, if different from the applicant
fields.description: The name of the person completing the form on the applicant's behalf, if different from the applicant. Present only on the bilingual (Greece-specific) edition of the source; the corroborating English-only mirrors (Jordan/Lebanon) omit item 33 entirely -- disclosed as a minor edition difference in VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: personFillingFormAddressEmail
fields.label: Address and e-mail address of the person filling in the application form
fields.description: See personFillingFormName for the edition-difference disclosure.

fields.name: personFillingFormTelephone
fields.label: Telephone no. (person filling in the application form)
fields.description: See personFillingFormName for the edition-difference disclosure.

fields.name: declarationPlace
fields.label: Place (declaration)
fields.description: The place accompanying the applicant's dated signature on the form's closing declaration (data-protection consent, accuracy/false-statement, and departure-undertaking clauses). No separate fillable field exists for the signature itself; a wet-ink signature mark has no text-layer equivalent, consistent with this registry's convention for such lines.

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.label: Date (declaration)
fields.description: The date accompanying the applicant's signature on the closing declaration. See declarationPlace for the signature-line disclosure.
